ashen_courtyard.name: Ashen Courtyard
ashen_courtyard.description: A crumbling plaza of blackened stone. Ash drifts like snow from a pale sky.

void_bridge.name: The Void Bridge
void_bridge.description: A narrow stone bridge spanning an endless dark chasm. Runes glow faintly on the railings.

ruined_keep.name: The Ruined Keep
ruined_keep.description: A great fortress with a collapsed ceiling. A Void-Touched Wolf prowls the rubble.

throne_vault.name: The Throne Vault
throne_vault.description: A hidden underground chamber. A shard of the Void Crown rests on a stone pedestal.

ashen_catacombs.name: Ashen Catacombs
ashen_catacombs.description: A labyrinth of bones and silent tombs beneath the courtyard. The air is heavy with the smell of old dust.

shattered_observatory.name: Shattered Observatory
shattered_observatory.description: A high tower that seems to tilt toward the Void Below. Giant brass telescopes point at nothingness.

saltmarsh_gate.name: Saltmarsh Gate
saltmarsh_gate.description: The heavy salvaged iron gates protecting the settlement of Saltmarsh.

the_ashen_flagon.name: The Ashen Flagon
the_ashen_flagon.description: A warm, smoky tavern built inside the hull of a crashed sky-ship.
